headline: Is It Time To Reassess Constellation Energy (CEG) After Its Strong Multi Year Rally
summary: Wondering if Constellation Energy’s share price still makes sense after a strong run, or if expectations have gone too far? This valuation review is built to help you frame that question clearly. The stock closed at US$279.25, with returns of 35.6% over 1 year and a very large gain over 3 years. The price has seen a 5.3% decline over 7 days, 15.3% over 30 days, and 23.8% year to date. Recent coverage has focused on Constellation Energy’s role in the US utilities sector and its position in...

headline: US Stock Market Today: S&P 500 Futures Rise As Yields Ease And Cost Risks Linger
summary: The Morning Bull - US Market Morning Update Wednesday, Apr, 1 2026 US stock futures are pointing higher this morning, with E mini S&P 500 contracts up about 0.5% and Nasdaq 100 futures gaining roughly 0.7%, as investors react to two big themes. First, government bond yields are easing, with the US 10 year sitting at 4.28%, which can take some pressure off borrowing costs for households and companies. Second, a wave of global manufacturing surveys is painting a mixed picture, where many...
